title: systests: tighter checks for unwanted warnings
body:
Part of RUN-1906.

Followup to #19878 (check stderr in system tests): allow_warnings()
and require_warning() functions to make sure no unexpected messages
fall through the cracks.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body: I love the trend of these PRs as of late @edsantiago .  However, for this one, the CI is kicking up it's heals a bit.
